Class ExpenseManager

java.lang.Object
control.ExpenseManager
public class ExpenseManager extends Object
Coordinates expense and category operations, delegating persistence to DatabaseHelper and triggering budget alerts via AlertManager.

This is the primary control-layer entry point for anything related to logging, editing, or deleting expenses, as well as managing categories.

  • Field Summary

    Fields

    Field
    Description
    private AlertManager
    alertManager
    Responsible for checking budget thresholds after each expense.

    Persistence helper for all database operations.
    private LimitCalculator
    limitCalculator
    Recalculates the daily spending limit after each expense.

  • Field Details

    • dbHelper

      private DatabaseHelper dbHelper
      Persistence helper for all database operations.

    • alertManager

      private AlertManager alertManager
      Responsible for checking budget thresholds after each expense.

      Recalculates the daily spending limit after each expense.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExpenseManager

      public ExpenseManager()
      Constructs an ExpenseManager and initialises its collaborators.

  • Method Details

    • logExpense

      public Expense logExpense(double amount, int categoryId, int cycleId)
      Logs a new expense, persists it, recalculates the daily limit, and checks budget thresholds.
      Parameters:
      amount - monetary value in EGP (must be > 0)
      categoryId - ID of the category to assign
      cycleId - ID of the active budget cycle
      Returns:
      the persisted Expense with its generated ID set

    • editExpense

      public void editExpense(int id, double amount, int categoryId)
      Updates the amount and category of an existing expense.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the expense to edit
      amount - new monetary value in EGP
      categoryId - new category ID

    • deleteExpense

      public void deleteExpense(int id)
      Permanently deletes an expense record from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the expense to delete

    • getExpensesByCycle

      public List<Expense> getExpensesByCycle(int cycleId)
      Returns all expenses belonging to a given budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      Returns:
      list of Expense objects; empty if none found

    • getExpensesByCategory

      public List<Expense> getExpensesByCategory(int cycleId, int categoryId)
      Returns all expenses for a specific category within a cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      categoryId - the category to filter by
      Returns:
      filtered list of Expense objects

    • insertCategory

      public Category insertCategory(String name, int iconResId)
      Creates and persists a new expense category.
      Parameters:
      name - display name for the category
      iconResId - icon resource ID (pass 0 if none)
      Returns:
      the newly created Category with its generated ID set

    • getCategories

      public List<Category> getCategories()
      Returns all categories stored in the database.
      Returns:
      list of all Category objects

    • getTodaySpent

      public double getTodaySpent(int cycleId)
      Returns the total amount spent today within the given cycle.
      Parameters:
      cycleId - the cycle to query
      Returns:
      today's total spending in EGP

    • deleteCategory

      public void deleteCategory(int id)
      Permanently deletes a category from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the category to delete
